input.content:
<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Services\AiAnalysisService;
use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;

class AiController extends Controller
{
    /**
     * 通用 AI 对话接口，供 oa-server 调用。
     * 支持 blocking（返回 JSON）和 streaming（返回 SSE）两种模式。
     */
    public function chat(Request $request): mixed
    {
        $systemPrompt = $request->input('system_prompt', '');
        $message = $request->input('message', '');
        $responseMode = $request->input('response_mode', 'blocking');
        $history = $request->input('history', []);

        if ($responseMode === 'streaming') {
            return response()->stream(function () use ($message, $systemPrompt, $history) {
                AiAnalysisService::app()->analyzeStream(
                    $message,
                    $systemPrompt,
                    function (string $chunk) {
                        echo 'data: ' . json_encode([
                            'event' => 'message',
                            'answer' => $chunk,
                        ], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE) . PHP_EOL . PHP_EOL;
                        ob_flush();
                        flush();
                    },
                    $history
                );
                // 结束帧
                echo 'data: ' . json_encode([
                    'event' => 'message_end',
                ], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE) . PHP_EOL . PHP_EOL;
                ob_flush();
                flush();
            }, 200, [
                'Content-Type' => 'text/event-stream',
                'Cache-Control' => 'no-cache',
                'X-Accel-Buffering' => 'no',
            ]);
        }

        // Blocking mode
        $answer = AiAnalysisService::app()->analyze($message, $systemPrompt);

        return response()->json([
            'error_code' => '0',
            'error_msg' => '',
            'data' => ['answer' => $answer],
        ]);
    }
}
